title: UMI Uptime Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for system uptime and basic identity.

UptimeSeconds.description: Seconds since last boot. Agents: divide by 86400 for days.

PowerShellVersion.description: PowerShell version if running inside PS, null otherwise.

CpuPercentOverall.description: Aggregate CPU usage across all cores as a percentage.

MemoryUsedBytes.description: Total RAM currently in use in bytes.

MemoryAvailableBytes.description: Total RAM available for allocation in bytes.

SwapTotalBytes.description: Total virtual memory / swap space in bytes.

SwapUsedBytes.description: Total virtual memory / swap space currently in use in bytes.

LoadAverage1m.description: System load average over the last 1 minute. Null on Windows if not implemented.

LoadAverage5m.description: System load average over the last 5 minutes. Null on Windows if not implemented.

LoadAverage15m.description: System load average over the last 15 minutes. Null on Windows if not implemented.
